justification: Non-embedded standard-14 styles at 50 pt: Liberation letterforms differ from the oracle's Nimbus substitutes (Liberation Mono is visibly heavier than Nimbus Mono) and the ZapfDingbats line renders blank until a dingbat-capable face is bundled. Advances and metrics are oracle-exact. Measured worst (2026-07-11 @72dpi): 6.31% over d24, 6.93% over d8, mean 10.62.
